note: Representative evidence bundle for ONE control-plane change (defaulting require_second_reviewer_r2 to true). Values are illustrative; regenerate real digests with `scripts/assure.py handoff` + `evidence-manifest` from the exact candidate.

handling.differential_or_tamper_testing: BENCH-REV-001/002 exercise reviewer binding; assess flips CTRL-SECOND-REVIEWER-R2 PARTIAL->PASS

attestation.reason: Signed with the published demo key; a production VERIFIED requires the external verifier's private key, which never enters this repository.

rollback: git revert of the one-line aers.toml change restores opt-in behavior; no data migration.
residual_risk: Until an external verifier is deployed, the VERIFIED verdict for this change is simulated (offline-demo), not production-valid.
